testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Azure data engineers who integrate, transform, and consolidate data from various structured, unstructured, and streaming data systems into a suitable schema for building analytics solutions
recommended_experience: Solid knowledge of data processing languages, including SQL, Python, and Scala. Understanding of parallel processing and data architecture patterns. Proficiency in using Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Stream Analytics, Azure Event Hubs, Azure Data Lake Storage, and Azure Databricks

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Implement a partition strategy
sub_objectives: Implement a partition strategy for files
Implement a partition strategy for analytical workloads
Implement a partition strategy for streaming workloads
Implement a partition strategy for Azure Synapse Analytics
Identify when partitioning is needed in Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2

objectives.id: Design and implement the data exploration layer
objectives.title: Design and implement the data exploration layer
sub_objectives: Create and execute queries by using a compute solution that leverages SQL serverless and Spark clusters
Recommend and implement Azure Synapse Analytics database templates
Push new or updated data lineage to Microsoft Purview
Browse and search metadata in Microsoft Purview Data Catalog

objectives.title: Ingest and transform data
sub_objectives: Design and implement incremental data loads
Transform data by using Apache Spark
Transform data by using Transact-SQL (T-SQL) in Azure Synapse Analytics
Ingest and transform data by using Azure Synapse Pipelines or Azure Data Factory
Transform data by using Azure Stream Analytics

objectives.title: Cleanse data
sub_objectives: Avoiding duplicate data by using Azure Stream Analytics Exactly Once Delivery
Configure error handling for a transformation

objectives.title: Develop a batch processing solution
sub_objectives: Develop batch processing solutions by using Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse Analytics, and Azure Data Factory
Use PolyBase to load data to a SQL pool
Implement Azure Synapse Link and query the replicated data

objectives.title: Create data pipelines
sub_objectives: Integrate Jupyter or Python notebooks into a data pipeline
Revert data to a previous state
Read from and write to a delta lake

objectives.title: Develop a stream processing solution
sub_objectives: Create a stream processing solution by using Stream Analytics and Azure Event Hubs
Process data by using Spark structured streaming
Configure checkpoints and watermarking during processing
Optimize pipelines for analytical or transactional purposes
Read from and write to a delta lake

objectives.title: Manage batches and pipelines
sub_objectives: Manage data pipelines in Azure Data Factory or Azure Synapse Pipelines
Schedule data pipelines in Data Factory or Azure Synapse Pipelines
Implement version control for pipeline artifacts
Manage Spark jobs in a pipeline

domains.id: Secure, monitor, and optimize data storage and data processing
domains.name: Secure, monitor, and optimize data storage and data processing

objectives.title: Implement data security
sub_objectives: Encrypt data at rest and in motion
Implement POSIX-like access control lists (ACLs) for Data Lake Storage Gen2
Implement resource tokens in Azure Databricks
Load a DataFrame with sensitive information
Write encrypted data to tables or Parquet files

objectives.id: Monitor data storage and data processing
objectives.title: Monitor data storage and data processing
sub_objectives: Implement logging used by Azure Monitor
Monitor and update statistics about data across a system
Interpret Azure Monitor metrics and logs

objectives.id: Optimize and troubleshoot data storage and data processing
objectives.title: Optimize and troubleshoot data storage and data processing
sub_objectives: Troubleshoot a failed pipeline run, including activities executed in external services
